script: echo === claude-token drop-in ===; sudo cat /etc/systemd/system/alejandro-responder.service.d/claude-token.conf 2>/dev/null; echo; echo === actual python errors ===; sudo journalctl -u alejandro-responder.service --since '15min ago' --no-pager | grep -iE 'error|exception|traceback|fail|reply|claude' | tail -40; echo; echo === bot dir log files ===; sudo ls -la /home/alejandro/.alejandro-bot/ 2>/dev/null
